001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import java.util.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3.OpenApi;
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.cp.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger.*;
032
033/**
034 * A single session of generating an OpenAPI 3.1 document.
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * Reuses the {@link BasicSwaggerProviderSession} machinery to produce a Swagger 2.0 document, then
038 * applies the well-known Swagger 2.0 → OpenAPI 3.1 transformation (servers from host/basePath/schemes,
039 * requestBody from in:body and in:formData parameters, content negotiation moved to per-response
040 * blocks, definitions lifted to components.schemas, $ref rewritten under
041 * {@code "#/components/schemas/"}, etc) and parses the resulting JSON into an {@link OpenApi} bean.
042 *
043 * <p>
044 * The transformation runs at the JSON level on the Json5 representation of the Swagger document,
045 * which keeps the conversion rules co-located and makes them straightforward to extend without
046 * touching the underlying annotation-walker.
047 *
048 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
049 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/ApiDocsMixins">OpenAPI 3.1 Server Emission</a>
050 * </ul>
051 */
052@SuppressWarnings({
053   "java:S115",  // Field/constant identifiers mirror OpenAPI/Swagger wire-format keys (camelCase, dollar-prefixed)
054   "java:S1192"  // Duplicate string literals are OpenAPI wire-format keys used in JSON map construction; intentional
055})
056public class BasicOpenApiProviderSession {
057
058   private static final String OPENAPI_VERSION = "3.1.0";
059
060   private static final String K_openapi = "openapi";
061   private static final String K_host = "host";
062   private static final String K_basePath = "basePath";
063   private static final String K_schemes = "schemes";
064   private static final String K_servers = "servers";
065   private static final String K_consumes = "consumes";
066   private static final String K_produces = "produces";
067   private static final String K_paths = "paths";
068   private static final String K_parameters = "parameters";
069   private static final String K_requestBody = "requestBody";
070   private static final String K_responses = "responses";
071   private static final String K_content = "content";
072   private static final String K_schema = "schema";
073   private static final String K_required = "required";
074   private static final String K_in = "in";
075   private static final String K_name = "name";
076   private static final String K_definitions = "definitions";
077   private static final String K_securityDefinitions = "securityDefinitions";
078   private static final String K_components = "components";
079   private static final String K_securitySchemes = "securitySchemes";
080   private static final String K_schemas = "schemas";
081   private static final String K_$ref = "$ref";
082   private static final String K_examples = "examples";
083   private static final String K_description = "description";
084   private static final String K_type = "type";
085   private static final String K_format = "format";
086   private static final String K_enum = "enum";
087   private static final String K_items = "items";
088   private static final String K_default = "default";
089   private static final String K_pattern = "pattern";
090   private static final String K_minLength = "minLength";
091   private static final String K_maxLength = "maxLength";
092   private static final String K_minimum = "minimum";
093   private static final String K_maximum = "maximum";
094   private static final String K_exclusiveMinimum = "exclusiveMinimum";
095   private static final String K_exclusiveMaximum = "exclusiveMaximum";
096   private static final String K_minItems = "minItems";
097   private static final String K_maxItems = "maxItems";
098   private static final String K_uniqueItems = "uniqueItems";
099   private static final String K_multipleOf = "multipleOf";
100   private static final String K_collectionFormat = "collectionFormat";
101   private static final String K_properties = "properties";
102
103   private static final String DEFINITIONS_PREFIX = "#/definitions/";
104   private static final String COMPONENTS_PREFIX = "#/components/schemas/";
105   private static final String FORM_URLENCODED = "application/x-www-form-urlencoded";
106   private static final String DEFAULT_MEDIA_TYPE = "application/json";
107   private static final String IN_BODY = "body";
108   private static final String IN_FORM_DATA = "formData";
109
110   private static final Set<String> PARAMETER_SCHEMA_KEYS = Set.of(
111      K_type, K_format, K_enum, K_items, K_default, K_pattern,
112      K_minLength, K_maxLength, K_minimum, K_maximum, K_exclusiveMinimum, K_exclusiveMaximum,
113      K_minItems, K_maxItems, K_uniqueItems, K_multipleOf, K_collectionFormat
114   );
115
116   private final BasicSwaggerProviderSession swaggerSession;
117   private final JsonParser jp = Json5Parser.create().ignoreUnknownBeanProperties().build();
118
119   /**
120    * Constructor.
121    *
122    * @param context The context of the REST object we're generating an OpenAPI doc for.
123    * @param locale The language of the document we're asking for.
124    * @param ff The file finder to use for finding JSON files.
125    * @param messages The messages to use for finding localized strings.
126    * @param vr The variable resolver to use for resolving variables.
127    * @param js The JSON-schema generator to use for stuff like examples.
128    */
129   public BasicOpenApiProviderSession(RestContext context, Locale locale, FileFinder ff, Messages messages, VarResolverSession vr, JsonSchemaGeneratorSession js) {
130      this.swaggerSession = new BasicSwaggerProviderSession(context, locale, ff, messages, vr, js);
131   }
132
133   /**
134    * Generates the OpenAPI 3.1 document.
135    *
136    * @return A new {@link OpenApi} object.
137    * @throws Exception If an error occurred producing the document.
138    */
139   @SuppressWarnings({
140      "java:S112" // throws Exception intentional - callback/lifecycle method
141   })
142   public OpenApi getOpenApi() throws Exception {
143      var swagger = swaggerSession.getSwagger();
144      // Round-trip via Json5 so we work with a plain Json5Map and can apply the spec mapping
145      // without touching the typed Swagger / OpenApi beans.
146      var swaggerMap = Json5.to(Json5.of(swagger), Json5Map.class);
147      if (swaggerMap == null)
148         swaggerMap = new Json5Map();
149      var openApiMap = transform(swaggerMap);
150      var openApiJson = Json5Serializer.DEFAULT_READABLE.toString(openApiMap);
151      return jp.parse(openApiJson, OpenApi.class);
152   }
153
154   /**
155    * Apply the Swagger 2.0 → OpenAPI 3.1 mapping to a Json5Map produced by the Swagger session.
156    *
157    * @param swagger The Swagger 2.0 representation as a Json5Map.
158    * @return A fresh {@link Json5Map} representing the OpenAPI 3.1 document.
159    */
160   @SuppressWarnings({
161      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for sequential field-by-field rewrite of spec map
162   })
163   static Json5Map transform(Json5Map swagger) {
164      var out = new Json5Map();
165      out.put(K_openapi, OPENAPI_VERSION);
166
167      copyIfPresent(swagger, out, "info");
168      copyIfPresent(swagger, out, "tags");
169      copyIfPresent(swagger, out, "externalDocs");
170
171      // Build servers from host / basePath / schemes.
172      var servers = buildServers(swagger);
173      if (! servers.isEmpty())
174         out.put(K_servers, servers);
175
176      var topConsumes = listOfStrings(swagger.get(K_consumes));
177      var topProduces = listOfStrings(swagger.get(K_produces));
178
179      // Paths: rewrite each operation.
180      var paths = swagger.get(K_paths);
181      if (paths instanceof Map<?,?> pathsMap) {
182         var newPaths = new Json5Map();
183         for (var pe : pathsMap.entrySet()) {
184            var path = String.valueOf(pe.getKey());
185            if (! (pe.getValue() instanceof Map<?,?> pathItem))
186               continue;
187            var newPathItem = new Json5Map();
188            for (var oe : pathItem.entrySet()) {
189               var method = String.valueOf(oe.getKey());
190               if (! (oe.getValue() instanceof Map<?,?> opMap))
191                  continue;
192               newPathItem.put(method, transformOperation(toJson5Map(opMap), topConsumes, topProduces));
193            }
194            newPaths.put(path, newPathItem);
195         }
196         out.put(K_paths, newPaths);
197      }
198
199      // definitions → components.schemas
200      var components = new Json5Map();
201      var defs = swagger.get(K_definitions);
202      if (defs instanceof Map<?,?> defsMap && ! defsMap.isEmpty()) {
203         var schemas = new Json5Map();
204         for (var e : defsMap.entrySet())
205            schemas.put(String.valueOf(e.getKey()), rewriteRefs(e.getValue()));
206         components.put(K_schemas, schemas);
207      }
208      // securityDefinitions → components.securitySchemes
209      var secDefs = swagger.get(K_securityDefinitions);
210      if (secDefs instanceof Map<?,?> secDefsMap && ! secDefsMap.isEmpty()) {
211         var schemes = new Json5Map();
212         for (var e : secDefsMap.entrySet())
213            schemes.put(String.valueOf(e.getKey()), rewriteRefs(e.getValue()));
214         components.put(K_securitySchemes, schemes);
215      }
216      if (! components.isEmpty())
217         out.put(K_components, components);
218
219      // Rewrite all $refs anywhere in the document so subsequent passes work uniformly.
220      var rewritten = (Json5Map) rewriteRefs(out);
221
222      // Lift inline schemas that occur in two or more operation slots into components.schemas
223      // and replace each occurrence with a $ref. Schemas already carrying a $ref are left alone.
224      return deduplicateInlineSchemas(rewritten);
225   }
226
227   /**
228    * Walks all operation-level schema slots ({@code parameters[*].schema},
229    * {@code requestBody.content[*].schema}, {@code responses[*].content[*].schema} — and any
230    * {@code schema} key nested within those), and lifts every inline schema that appears two or
231    * more times into {@code components.schemas}, replacing each occurrence with a
232    * {@code $ref: "#/components/schemas/&lt;name&gt;"} pointer. Schemas already carrying a
233    * {@code $ref} are left in place. The lifted entry is keyed by its {@code title} when present
234    * (and that name is not already taken); otherwise a synthesized {@code Schema&lt;N&gt;} name is
235    * assigned with collision avoidance against any existing {@code components.schemas} entries.
236    *
237    * @param doc The OpenAPI document after the initial transform + $ref rewrite pass.
238    * @return The same document with duplicate inline schemas hoisted.
239    */
240   static Json5Map deduplicateInlineSchemas(Json5Map doc) {
241      var sites = new LinkedHashMap<String,List<SchemaSite>>();
242      collectOperationSchemas(doc, sites);
243      if (sites.isEmpty())
244         return doc;
245
246      var components = (Json5Map) doc.get(K_components);
247      if (components == null)
248         components = new Json5Map();
249      var schemas = (Json5Map) components.get(K_schemas);
250      if (schemas == null)
251         schemas = new Json5Map();
252      var existingNames = new LinkedHashSet<>(schemas.keySet());
253
254      var counter = new int[]{0};
255      var hoisted = false;
256      for (var entry : sites.entrySet()) {
257         var occurrences = entry.getValue();
258         if (occurrences.size() < 2)
259            continue;
260         var inline = occurrences.get(0).schema();
261         var name = pickSchemaName(inline, existingNames, counter);
262         existingNames.add(name);
263         schemas.put(name, inline);
264         var ref = new Json5Map();
265         ref.put(K_$ref, COMPONENTS_PREFIX + name);
266         for (var s : occurrences)
267            s.replaceWith(new Json5Map(ref));
268         hoisted = true;
269      }
270
271      if (hoisted) {
272         if (! schemas.isEmpty())
273            components.put(K_schemas, schemas);
274         if (! components.isEmpty())
275            doc.put(K_components, components);
276      }
277      return doc;
278   }
279
280   private static void collectOperationSchemas(Json5Map doc, Map<String,List<SchemaSite>> sites) {
281      var paths = doc.get(K_paths);
282      if (! (paths instanceof Map<?,?> pathsMap))
283         return;
284      for (var pe : pathsMap.entrySet()) {
285         if (! (pe.getValue() instanceof Map<?,?> pathItem))
286            continue;
287         for (var oe : pathItem.entrySet()) {
288            if (! (oe.getValue() instanceof Map<?,?> op))
289               continue;
290            visitOperation(toJson5Map(op), sites);
291         }
292      }
293   }
294
295   private static void visitOperation(Json5Map op, Map<String,List<SchemaSite>> sites) {
296      var params = op.get(K_parameters);
297      if (params instanceof List<?> paramList) {
298         for (var p : paramList) {
299            if (p instanceof Map<?,?> pm)
300               visitSchemaSlot(toJson5Map(pm), K_schema, sites);
301         }
302      }
303      var requestBody = op.get(K_requestBody);
304      if (requestBody instanceof Map<?,?> rb)
305         visitContent(toJson5Map(rb), sites);
306      var responses = op.get(K_responses);
307      if (responses instanceof Map<?,?> resp) {
308         for (var re : resp.entrySet()) {
309            if (re.getValue() instanceof Map<?,?> r)
310               visitContent(toJson5Map(r), sites);
311         }
312      }
313   }
314
315   private static void visitContent(Json5Map holder, Map<String,List<SchemaSite>> sites) {
316      var content = holder.get(K_content);
317      if (! (content instanceof Map<?,?> contentMap))
318         return;
319      for (var ce : contentMap.entrySet()) {
320         if (ce.getValue() instanceof Map<?,?> media)
321            visitSchemaSlot(toJson5Map(media), K_schema, sites);
322      }
323   }
324
325   private static void visitSchemaSlot(Json5Map parent, String key, Map<String,List<SchemaSite>> sites) {
326      var v = parent.get(key);
327      if (! (v instanceof Map<?,?> sm))
328         return;
329      var schema = toJson5Map(sm);
330      // Re-attach the normalized map so subsequent replaceWith() updates the document.
331      parent.put(key, schema);
332      if (schema.containsKey(K_$ref))
333         return;
334      if (schema.isEmpty())
335         return;
336      var canonical = canonicalize(schema);
337      sites.computeIfAbsent(canonical, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(new SchemaSite(parent, key));
338   }
339
340   private static String canonicalize(Object o) {
341      try {
342         return Json5Serializer.DEFAULT.copy().sortMaps().build().toString(o);
343      } catch (Exception e) {
344         return String.valueOf(o);
345      }
346   }
347
348   private static String pickSchemaName(Json5Map schema, Set<String> taken, int[] counter) {
349      var title = schema.getString("title");
350      if (nn(title) && ! title.isBlank() && ! taken.contains(title))
351         return title;
352      while (true) {
353         counter[0]++;
354         var candidate = "Schema" + counter[0];
355         if (! taken.contains(candidate))
356            return candidate;
357      }
358   }
359
360   /** Tracks the parent map plus the slot key where an inline schema lives so we can replace it in-place. */
361   private record SchemaSite(Json5Map parent, String key) {
362      Json5Map schema() {
363         return (Json5Map) parent.get(key);
364      }
365      void replaceWith(Json5Map replacement) {
366         parent.put(key, replacement);
367      }
368   }
369
370   @SuppressWarnings({
371      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for OpenAPI operation transformation logic
372      "java:S6541"  // Brain Method acceptable for OpenAPI operation transformation dispatch
373   })
374   private static Json5Map transformOperation(Json5Map op, List<String> topConsumes, List<String> topProduces) {
375      var newOp = new Json5Map();
376      for (var e : op.entrySet()) {
377         var k = e.getKey();
378         if (K_parameters.equals(k) || K_responses.equals(k) || K_consumes.equals(k) || K_produces.equals(k))
379            continue;
380         newOp.put(k, e.getValue());
381      }
382      var consumes = listOfStrings(op.get(K_consumes));
383      if (consumes.isEmpty())
384         consumes = topConsumes;
385      var produces = listOfStrings(op.get(K_produces));
386      if (produces.isEmpty())
387         produces = topProduces;
388
389      var oldParams = op.get(K_parameters);
390      var newParams = new ArrayList<Object>();
391      Json5Map requestBody = null;
392      Json5Map formSchema = null;
393      var formRequired = new LinkedHashSet<String>();
394
395      if (oldParams instanceof List<?> paramsList) {
396         for (var p : paramsList) {
397            if (! (p instanceof Map<?,?> pm))
398               continue;
399            var pmap = toJson5Map(pm);
400            var in = String.valueOf(pmap.getOrDefault(K_in, ""));
401            if (IN_BODY.equals(in)) {
402               requestBody = bodyParameterToRequestBody(pmap, consumes);
403            } else if (IN_FORM_DATA.equals(in)) {
404               if (formSchema == null) {
405                  formSchema = new Json5Map();
406                  formSchema.put(K_type, "object");
407                  formSchema.put(K_properties, new Json5Map());
408               }
409               var name = String.valueOf(pmap.getOrDefault(K_name, ""));
410               if (! name.isEmpty()) {
411                  var props = (Json5Map) formSchema.get(K_properties);
412                  props.put(name, extractInlineSchema(pmap));
413                  if (Boolean.TRUE.equals(pmap.get(K_required)))
414                     formRequired.add(name);
415               }
416            } else {
417               newParams.add(transformQueryHeaderPathParameter(pmap));
418            }
419         }
420      }
421
422      if (requestBody == null && formSchema != null) {
423         requestBody = new Json5Map();
424         if (! formRequired.isEmpty())
425            formSchema.put(K_required, new ArrayList<>(formRequired));
426         var content = new Json5Map();
427         var media = new Json5Map();
428         media.put(K_schema, formSchema);
429         content.put(FORM_URLENCODED, media);
430         requestBody.put(K_content, content);
431      }
432      if (requestBody != null)
433         newOp.put(K_requestBody, requestBody);
434
435      if (! newParams.isEmpty())
436         newOp.put(K_parameters, newParams);
437
438      var oldResponses = op.get(K_responses);
439      if (oldResponses instanceof Map<?,?> respMap) {
440         var newResponses = new Json5Map();
441         for (var re : respMap.entrySet()) {
442            var code = String.valueOf(re.getKey());
443            if (re.getValue() instanceof Map<?,?> rm)
444               newResponses.put(code, transformResponse(toJson5Map(rm), produces));
445            else
446               newResponses.put(code, re.getValue());
447         }
448         newOp.put(K_responses, newResponses);
449      }
450      return newOp;
451   }
452
453   @SuppressWarnings({
454      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for OpenAPI body-parameter to request-body conversion
455   })
456   private static Json5Map bodyParameterToRequestBody(Json5Map p, List<String> consumes) {
457      var rb = new Json5Map();
458      if (p.containsKey(K_description))
459         rb.put(K_description, p.get(K_description));
460      if (Boolean.TRUE.equals(p.get(K_required)))
461         rb.put(K_required, Boolean.TRUE);
462      var schema = p.get(K_schema);
463      if (schema == null && p.containsKey(K_type))
464         schema = extractInlineSchema(p);
465      var content = new Json5Map();
466      var media = consumes.isEmpty() ? List.of(DEFAULT_MEDIA_TYPE) : consumes;
467      for (var mt : media) {
468         var entry = new Json5Map();
469         if (schema != null)
470            entry.put(K_schema, schema);
471         content.put(mt, entry);
472      }
473      rb.put(K_content, content);
474      return rb;
475   }
476
477   @SuppressWarnings({
478      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for the schema vs examples-only content-block emission; the two branches differ in how each media entry is populated and are asserted by OpenAPI output tests.
479   })
480   private static Json5Map transformResponse(Json5Map response, List<String> produces) {
481      var newResp = new Json5Map();
482      for (var e : response.entrySet()) {
483         var k = e.getKey();
484         if (K_schema.equals(k) || K_examples.equals(k))
485            continue;
486         newResp.put(k, e.getValue());
487      }
488      var schema = response.get(K_schema);
489      if (schema != null) {
490         var content = new Json5Map();
491         var media = produces.isEmpty() ? List.of(DEFAULT_MEDIA_TYPE) : produces;
492         for (var mt : media) {
493            var entry = new Json5Map();
494            entry.put(K_schema, schema);
495            addExamplesForMedia(response, mt, entry);
496            content.put(mt, entry);
497         }
498         newResp.put(K_content, content);
499      } else if (response.containsKey(K_examples)) {
500         // Examples without schema — still surface under content blocks.
501         var content = new Json5Map();
502         var media = produces.isEmpty() ? List.of(DEFAULT_MEDIA_TYPE) : produces;
503         for (var mt : media) {
504            var entry = new Json5Map();
505            addExamplesForMedia(response, mt, entry);
506            if (! entry.isEmpty())
507               content.put(mt, entry);
508         }
509         if (! content.isEmpty())
510            newResp.put(K_content, content);
511      }
512      return newResp;
513   }
514
515   private static void addExamplesForMedia(Json5Map response, String mediaType, Json5Map entry) {
516      var examples = response.get(K_examples);
517      if (examples instanceof Map<?,?> em && em.containsKey(mediaType))
518         entry.put("example", em.get(mediaType));
519   }
520
521   private static Json5Map transformQueryHeaderPathParameter(Json5Map p) {
522      var newP = new Json5Map();
523      var schema = new Json5Map();
524      for (var e : p.entrySet()) {
525         var k = e.getKey();
526         if (PARAMETER_SCHEMA_KEYS.contains(k)) {
527            if (! K_collectionFormat.equals(k))
528               schema.put(k, e.getValue());
529         } else {
530            newP.put(k, e.getValue());
531         }
532      }
533      if (! schema.isEmpty()) {
534         var existing = (Json5Map) newP.get(K_schema);
535         if (existing == null)
536            newP.put(K_schema, schema);
537         else
538            schema.forEach(existing::putIfAbsent);
539      }
540      return newP;
541   }
542
543   private static Json5Map extractInlineSchema(Json5Map p) {
544      var schema = new Json5Map();
545      for (var e : p.entrySet()) {
546         var k = e.getKey();
547         if ((PARAMETER_SCHEMA_KEYS.contains(k) && ! K_collectionFormat.equals(k)) || K_$ref.equals(k))
548            schema.put(k, e.getValue());
549      }
550      return schema;
551   }
552
553   private static List<Object> buildServers(Json5Map swagger) {
554      var servers = new ArrayList<Object>();
555      var host = String.valueOf(swagger.getOrDefault(K_host, ""));
556      var basePath = String.valueOf(swagger.getOrDefault(K_basePath, ""));
557      var schemes = listOfStrings(swagger.get(K_schemes));
558      if (host.isEmpty() && basePath.isEmpty() && schemes.isEmpty())
559         return servers;
560      if (schemes.isEmpty())
561         schemes = List.of("http");
562      for (var scheme : schemes) {
563         var url = scheme + "://" + host + basePath;
564         var server = new Json5Map();
565         server.put("url", url);
566         servers.add(server);
567      }
568      return servers;
569   }
570
571   private static List<String> listOfStrings(Object o) {
572      if (! (o instanceof List<?> l))
573         return List.of();
574      var out = new ArrayList<String>(l.size());
575      for (var v : l)
576         out.add(String.valueOf(v));
577      return out;
578   }
579
580   private static Json5Map toJson5Map(Map<?,?> m) {
581      if (m instanceof Json5Map jm)
582         return jm;
583      var out = new Json5Map();
584      for (var e : m.entrySet())
585         out.put(String.valueOf(e.getKey()), e.getValue());
586      return out;
587   }
588
589   private static void copyIfPresent(Json5Map src, Json5Map dst, String key) {
590      if (src.containsKey(key))
591         dst.put(key, src.get(key));
592   }
593
594   /**
595    * Walks any nested {@code Map}/{@code List} and rewrites {@code $ref: "#/definitions/Foo"}
596    * references to the OpenAPI 3.x form {@code "#/components/schemas/Foo"}.
597    *
598    * @param o The input object.
599    * @return A copy with all {@code $ref} entries rewritten.
600    */
601   static Object rewriteRefs(Object o) {
602      if (o instanceof Map<?,?> map) {
603         var copy = new Json5Map();
604         for (var e : map.entrySet()) {
605            var k = String.valueOf(e.getKey());
606            var v = e.getValue();
607            if (K_$ref.equals(k) && v instanceof String s && s.startsWith(DEFINITIONS_PREFIX))
608               copy.put(k, COMPONENTS_PREFIX + s.substring(DEFINITIONS_PREFIX.length()));
609            else
610               copy.put(k, rewriteRefs(v));
611         }
612         return copy;
613      }
614      if (o instanceof List<?> list) {
615         var copy = new ArrayList<>(list.size());
616         for (var v : list)
617            copy.add(rewriteRefs(v));
618         return copy;
619      }
620      if (nn(o))
621         return o;
622      return null;
623   }
624}
